name: OpenClaw
description: Personal AI assistant platform — run your own AI on any device, any channel

name: Claude Code
description: An agentic coding tool from Anthropic that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster through natural language commands.

name: Codex CLI
description: A lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal. Codex can read and modify local files, execute commands, and iterate — turning natural language into working code.

name: Cline
description: An autonomous coding agent for VS Code that can create and edit files, execute commands, use the browser, and more — with your permission at every step.

name: Continue
description: Open-source AI code assistant for any IDE

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor with built-in chat, Composer agent mode, and multi-model support. The most popular AI IDE.

name: Gemini CLI
description: An open-source AI agent for the command line, built on the Gemini model, that helps developers with coding tasks directly from the terminal.

name: OpenCode
description: Minimal, fast AI coding CLI with a beautiful TUI. Multi-provider support, MCP servers, and headless mode for scripting.

name: Roo Code
description: AI coding agent for VS Code (Cline fork)

name: Windsurf
description: AI-powered IDE by Codeium with Cascade — an agentic coding flow that understands your codebase and edits across files.

name: Hermes Agent
description: Self-improving AI agent with persistent memory, learning loop, and multi-platform support (Telegram, Discord, CLI, WhatsApp, Signal, Slack). 40+ built-in tools, cron scheduling, and autonomous subagents.

name: Kilocode
description: Open-source AI coding agent for VS Code with multi-provider support, custom modes, and MCP integration.
